description: Our main warehouse (WH/Stock) has been reorganized into three dedicated storage zones, and we need to automate product routing based on product categories. Log in as admin/admin. Create three sub-locations under the parent location 'WH/Stock' named 'Zone A - Power Tools', 'Zone B - Hand Tools', and 'Zone C - Fasteners'. Configure putaway rules for 'WH/Stock' to route the 'Power Tools' category to 'Zone A - Power Tools', the 'Hand Tools' category to 'Zone B - Hand Tools', and the 'Fasteners' category to 'Zone C - Fasteners'.

natural_language.prompt: Our main warehouse (WH/Stock) has been reorganized into three dedicated storage zones, and we need to automate product routing based on product categories. First, ensure the 'Storage Locations' feature is enabled in Inventory Settings. Second, create three new sub-locations under the parent location 'WH/Stock' with these exact names: 'Zone A - Power Tools', 'Zone B - Hand Tools', and 'Zone C - Fasteners'. Finally, navigate to Putaway Rules and create three rules that trigger when products arrive in 'WH/Stock'. Map the 'Power Tools' category to the 'Zone A' location, the 'Hand Tools' category to the 'Zone B' location, and the 'Fasteners' category to the 'Zone C' location.
